camera.notes: Perspective camera/controller package proof over the cooked 3D scene.

inputMap.purpose: Drive deterministic primary camera/controller smoke evidence.
Document the intended 3D inspection loop while package validation remains deterministic.

coreLoop.objective: Inspect the cooked 3D package scene while public physics, navigation, AI, renderer-quality, UI, and package-streaming smoke rows prove selected systems.
coreLoop.feedback: Scene render, primary camera/controller, renderer-quality, collision, UI overlay, and gameplay systems counters report package-visible feedback.
coreLoop.winState: Installed package recipes report ready scene, camera/controller, collision, UI, and selected D3D12 renderer-quality evidence.
coreLoop.failState: Invalid package rows, missing shader artifacts, unsafe native claims, or missing gameplay counters fail static or package validation.
coreLoop.restart: Rerun selected package smokes from manifest-declared runtime files and host-gated shader artifacts.

sceneList.purpose: Desktop runtime configuration shipped through runtimePackageFiles.
Package index used by runtime scene loading and package validation.
Scene v2 authoring input reviewed before package migration.
Prefab v2 authoring input reviewed before package migration.

assetRequests.purpose: Cooked texture fixture for material and scene GPU package evidence.
First-party mesh source and cooked mesh payload for scene draw evidence.
Runtime material plus source material/HLSL authoring inputs for selected shader package smokes.
Cooked UI atlas image/text package metadata for native overlay package evidence.
Cooked collision scene package rows for selected 3D collision query evidence.

qualityGates.evidence: Installed package validation loads manifest-derived config, package index, and cooked 3D scene payloads.
Primary camera/controller, scene rendering, UI overlay, and directional shadow counters are selected package evidence.
Scene collision package smoke reports ready collision package and deterministic query counters.

aiOwnedSourceRoots.evidence: Generated game-owned files are confined to this root; shared repository surfaces require a separate developer-owned task.
Runtime package payload changes must stay manifest-listed and validation-recipe-backed.
Generated source authoring fixtures remain game-local before reviewed cook/package handoff.
Generated shader source fixtures remain game-local and require shader-toolchain validation before package claims.

forbiddenSharedPaths.reason: Engine internals require a separate developer-owned capability task.
Editor internals are outside generated-game mutation scope.
Shared automation changes require a repository workflow task.
Shared schema changes require explicit agent-surface synchronization.
Machine-readable engine contracts are composed from reviewed fragments only.
CI workflow changes are outside generated-game mutation scope.
Plan and production-ledger changes are developer-owned repository work.
Shared game registration is changed only by reviewed scaffolding tools.

remediationActions.trigger: A manifest-declared runtime package payload is missing or not registered.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Repair only game-local runtime payload registration before rerunning package validation.

remediationActions.trigger: A requested change targets a forbidden shared repository path.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Stop and record a developer-owned handoff instead of editing shared surfaces.

remediationActions.trigger: A requested game behavior needs an unsupported reusable engine capability.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Persist a reviewed aiWorkflow.engineCapabilityHandoffs row with first-party public-contract evidence.

remediationActions.trigger: A selected validation recipe fails after generated game-local mutation.
remediationActions.expectedResult: Repair game-owned rows without weakening validation, deleting evidence, or changing shared tooling.

gameplayContract.input: mirakana::VirtualInput deterministic right-key camera/controller movement over the cooked primary camera node
gameplayContract.scene: GameEngine.Scene.v1 loaded from a cooked package with static mesh, primary perspective camera, and directional light metadata
gameplayContract.sceneRenderer: mirakana::submit_scene_render_packet with material instance intent through first-party scene/material contracts
gameplayContract.renderer: mirakana::IRenderer from the desktop host with deterministic NullRenderer fallback and host-gated scene GPU binding when selected
gameplayContract.currentRuntime: generated host-gated SDL3 desktop runtime package proof for 3D gameplay with camera/controller movement, transform/quaternion animation, morph and compute morph package_upload_staging_ready=1, package_upload_staging_package_transactions=4, package_upload_staging_ring_backed_uploads=4, package_upload_staging_graphics_waited_for_copy=1, and backendReadiness.graphics: host-built D3D12 DXIL shader artifacts for selected package validation with optional generated 3D renderer quality counters for scene GPU + depth-aware postprocess with framegraph_passes=2, framegraph_passes_executed=4, framegraph_render_passes_recorded=4, framegraph_barrier_steps_executed=9, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_render_passes=4, and renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_barrier_steps=9, selected visible generated 3D production-style counters, selected directional shadow smoke counters with framegraph_render_passes_recorded=6, selected D3D12 graphics morph + directional shadow receiver counters with framegraph_render_passes_recorded=6, selected D3D12 native UI overlay HUD box counters, selected D3D12 cooked UI atlas image sprite and text glyph texture overlay counters, selected playable_3d_* package counters, and selected D3D12 package upload staging/resource-update counters through --require-package-upload-staging; Vulkan SPIR-V artifacts are toolchain-gated for generated 3D quality, shadow, playable, and native UI overlay artifacts, while visible proof, shadow-morph composition, native UI overlay readiness, generated 3D cooked UI atlas texture overlay readiness, and package upload staging readiness remain D3D12-selected until separate Vulkan recipes land; NullRenderer fallback remains available; Metal readiness, broad shadow quality, morph-deformed shadow-caster silhouettes, compute morph + shadow composition, production text/font UI, runtime source image decoding, source image atlas packing, GPU timestamps, backend-native stats, broad renderer quality, and broad generated 3D readiness remain unsupported
backendReadiness.audio: device-independent gameplay systems package smoke plus deterministic NullRenderer fallback
backendReadiness.ui: mirakana_ui HUD box submission plus one cooked GameEngine.UiAtlas.v1 image sprite and one cooked GameEngine.UiAtlas.v1 text glyph are validated through selected D3D12 host-owned native UI overlay package smokes; production text shaping, font rasterization, glyph atlas generation, runtime source image decoding, source image atlas packing, native accessibility bridges, Metal overlay readiness, and broad UI renderer quality remain unsupported
backendReadiness.physics: first-party deterministic authored-collision/controller package smoke, character/dynamic interaction policy counters, selected distance/fixed/linear-axis positional constraint counters, selected value-only kinematic motion and public simple vehicle policy counters, selected GameEngine.PhysicsCollisionScene3D.v1 package collision smoke, and selected collision_query_batch_ready package counters only; no middleware, native physics backend, dynamic-vs-dynamic TOI, rotational CCD, rotational rigid-body constraints, 2D CCD, persistent joint assets, broad vehicle dynamics/persistent vehicle simulation APIs, or scene/physics perception integration
